LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))

Agda.Builtin.List.List:
  mutual inductive(s):
    List
      constructors:
        Ֆ5bՖՖ5dՖ (0 arg(s))
        Ֆ_Ֆcons_ (2 arg(s))
